"'''Republic HoloNet News Core Edition 15:3:02'''" was an in-universe [[HoloNet News (Insider)|''Holonet News'']] issue published in [[Star Wars Insider 75|''Star Wars Insider'' 75]].

{{Magazine-stub|article}}

==Contents==
*''Duro Falls to Grievous—Confederacy Now Controls Vital System''
**''Duro Capitulates After Week-Long Fighting''
**''Coruscant System Borders Bolstered''
**''Onaconda Farr Steps Down From Action Committee''
*''Corellians Fear Impending Attack''
*''Senate Admits Bungling of Trade Spine Defense''

==Media==
===Collected in===
*<!-- 2004-04-06 -->[[Star Wars Insider 75|''Star Wars Insider'' 75]]
